top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Extend Losses, Bond Yields in Focus: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks fell for a fourth day as mounting inflation concerns fueled a rise in global bond yields, prompting investors to reassess valuations after a record-breaking rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
